name: Jindal Poly Films Limited
summary: Jindal Poly Films Limited manufactures and sells BOPET and BOPP films in India and internationally. It operates through Packaging Films and Nonwoven Fabrics segments. The company's BOPP films include transparent BOPP heat sealable and non-heat sealable films, solid white films, matte films, coex films, pearlized films, label BOPP films, opaque films, release films, tape and textile films, and metallize BOPP films; and PET films comprise chemical treated, opaque white, matte, high strength yarn grade, co-extruded clear, and ultra-clear corona treated PET films for the converting and graphic arts industry, as well as electrical insulation, label, and other applications. It also provides metalized films for flexible packaging, gift wrap, and decorative applications, as well as sequins for textiles; coated films, such as PVDC, acrylic, silicon, AlOx, ink receptive, digital printable, and DG coated films, as well as coated high COF matte PET and lidding films; and CPP films for regular applications and specialty films for high barrier and retort applications. In addition, the company offers thermal lamination films; non tearable paper films for photo albums, certificates, playing cards, gift cards, visiting cards, calendar, menu cards, wedding cards, and modelling portfolio applications; and medical X-Ray films. Further, it manufactures polyester chips; and polypropylene based spunbond and spunmelt fabrics in roll goods form. Jindal Poly Films Limited was incorporated in 1974 and is based in New Delhi, India.
